prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中国政法大学位于北京 ，属一线城市高校，对河南省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南省招生人数逐年增加，2025年河南招生占比约7.1%，属于该校重要生源省份。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9815 → 10741 → 14404 → 10962 → 15066, showing significant fluctuations, with a baseline ranking of about 15066 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for Physics Category was 45, 45, 42, 35 from 2021 to 2024, 42 in 2025, and 58 in 2026, a substantial increase of about 38.1% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, and is a top national political science and law institution.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
In 2024, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for Law in Inner Mongolia Science Category), and in 2026, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (historical campus safety incidents); Douyin heat ranking total 6th (high heat), ranked 5th in 2024 (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and rising application attention; Law is an A+ discipline (top nationally), the only discipline rated A- or above at this university, and the Law program is firmly in the first tier among the 'Five Academies and Four Schools', strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.
6. [Major Heat and Environment] The heat evaluation for the Law major in 2024 was 'divergent wait-and-see', cooling from its peak in 2022 but still in a relatively hot range; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province Gaokao is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32.3% from about 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates based on historical proportions, significantly expanding the candidate base and intensifying competition; 2026.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Heat and Region
专业热度与地域.text: China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment in Henan Province has increased year by year, with Henan accounting for about 7.1% of enrollment in 2025, making it an important source province for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 15066, a significant enrollment expansion of about 38.1% in 2026 (direction of increasing ranking numbers), a substantial increase of about 32.3% in the total number of Henan candidates (direction of intensifying competition), high Douyin heat attention (direction of intensifying competition), and a somewhat negative reputation (slightly pushing rankings upward), the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 18709, with a range of 18209–19209.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<18209), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1109 → 2097 → 1168 → 1661 → 1833, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend, with a baseline ranking of about 1833 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Henan Province was 55, 55, 58, and 71 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 84 in 2025, and planned 93 in 2026, an expansion of about 10.7% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, and is a top national political science and law institution.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for Law in Science category in Inner Mongolia), and in 2026, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (historical campus safety incidents). On Douyin, it ranked 6th in overall popularity (high heat), and 5th in 2024 (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, indicating sustained high application interest. Law is an A+ discipline (top nationally), the only discipline rated A- or above at this university, and Law programs are firmly in the first tier among the 'Five Academies and Four Schools,' strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university's enrollment in Henan Province has increased year by year, with Henan enrollment accounting for about 7.1% in 2025, making it an important source province for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1833, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.7% (ranking number increases), a significant increase in total Henan candidates by about 32.3% (competition intensifies), high Douyin attention (competition intensifies), and a somewhat negative reputation (slightly pushes ranking upward), the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1981, with a range of 1684–2278.
